content.en:
The Forbidden Zerg nest is the foundation of the Forbidden Zerg, and no matter how many Forbidden Zerg are killed, it will not have a great impact on the Forbidden Zerg, but it only restricts their development.

But once the Forbidden Zerg nest is destroyed, the Forbidden Zerg will not be able to continue to breed new Forbidden Zerg, and the Forbidden Zerg will not be far from extinction.

After all, the Forbidden Zerg can only rely on the Forbidden Zerg nest to conceive the clansmen, and there is no way to conceive the Forbidden Zerg through combination.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, can't we destroy the Forbidden Zerg's lair?"

The Wind King asked.

"It can't be destroyed!" Eternal Dao Ancestor sighed: "The Qinglong Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has the strongest attack, he broke through the defense and attacked the nest of the Forbidden Zerg, but the result is not able to shake it at all, not even a trace can be left, I am afraid that only the Domain Ancestor can be sure to destroy the nest of the Forbidden Zerg." We don't dare to enter the inside of the Forbidden Zerg Lair, otherwise even a half-step Domain Ancestor will fall into it!"

"Then we can only fight a war of attrition?"

The Fire King frowned.

Eternal Dao Ancestor said: "At present, the only way is to destroy the Forbidden Zerg outside the Forbidden Zerg Lair, and then seal the Forbidden Zerg Lair, in this way, the Forbidden Zerg Lair will not be developed, there will be no resource supply, and the powerful Forbidden Zerg will not be born, and the seal will not be broken." In this way, it can be regarded as solving the problem of the taboo zerg. "

"That's the only way to go!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor nodded.

The Dao Ancestor of the Divine Ruins also spoke: "All the Dao Ancestors under the command of the Black Wind Mountain can participate in the battle, but it is recommended that the Dao Ancestors below the Triple Heaven Dao Ancestor do not need to participate, otherwise it will be a death, and if you fall, it doesn't matter, the key is that your corpse will also become the energy for the rise of the Forbidden Zerg, although the Forbidden Zerg can also use the power of the Dark Forbidden to grow slowly, but the speed is very slow after all, but once they absorb the life energy, they can grow quickly!

Many heavenly kings answered one by one.

Soon, the meeting ended.

But Ye Tian was left behind because the Eternal Dao Ancestor had something to do with him.

------------------

"Eternal Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian stood in front of the Eternal Dao Ancestor and said respectfully.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, there is something I want to trouble you this time!" said the Eternal Dao Ancestor very politely.

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, please command!" Ye Tian hurriedly said.

Eternal Dao Ancestor said: "Nine Extremes Heavenly King, I know that you have a kind of doppelganger, and it is almost exactly the same as the main body, and you can even cast Dao techniques and talent methods, which are completely different from the techniques of incarnation and ordinary clones. We, the half-step domain ancestors, have tried it before, and when the incarnation enters the inside of the forbidden zerg lair, the connection is completely severed, and the incarnation collapses directly. Therefore, we in Black Wind Mountain hope that you will let your clone enter the Forbidden Zerg Lair to explore the situation, and if you can share some of the information to your body, then we Black Wind Mountain will at least be somewhat prepared. "

"Eternal Dao Ancestor, the other forces don't know about my doppelganger, right?"

Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

"I don't know!" Eternal Dao Ancestor said, "Even I can't see the difference between your clone and your body, and the other forces naturally don't know either." Moreover, this operation is a secret operation of our Black Wind Mountain, and we will not inform other forces. When the war begins, when the time comes, the Dao Ancestor and I will personally escort your clone into the Forbidden Zerg lair. "

"I promised!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Eternal Dao Ancestor explained some things and let Ye Tian leave.

Returning to the human race, Ye Tian also began to prepare.

First of all, he must arrange the affairs of the Terrans, after all, once he fights with the Forbidden Zerg in the Dark Forbidden Domain, who knows when he will come back, and what if he doesn't come back for a long time, what if something big happens to the Terrans?

Thereupon.

Ye Tian brought a group of Dao Ancestors out of the Forbidden Void Realm, and these Dao Ancestors had made a natal oath that they were not allowed to divulge the situation of the Forbidden Void Realm, so they did not need to worry about the exposure of the Forbidden Void Realm.

And there are too many people, plus there are taboo Zerg to attract the attention of all forces, and other forces will not pay attention to the small Terran.

Ye Tian let these Dao Ancestors sit all over the human race, and once they found something big, they would deal with it.

And at this time, the major forces have also begun to establish bases in the dark taboo edge area, after all, the Dao Ancestors fight with the forbidden insects, and they also need news, and there is almost no suitable place to rest in the Dark Forbidden Domain, so they must establish a base as a temporary news place for the Dao Ancestors.

In just ten years, a large number of bases have been established in the edge area of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and a large number of Dao Ancestors have set up countless large arrays in the void of the Dao Mountain Realm outside the edge of the Dark Forbidden Domain to prevent the taboo Zerg from breaking out of the encirclement and entering the Dao Mountain Realm.

Meanwhile.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm has established large teleportation arrays one after another, leading directly to the ancient giant city close to the Dark Forbidden Domain.

This eternal giant city is a temporary teleportation, and the Dao Ancestors of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm directly teleport here, and then a little further away is the Dark Forbidden Domain, which can enter the Dark Forbidden Domain as quickly as possible, and arrive at those bases without delay.

With the passage of time, a famous Dao Ancestor arrived at one base after another, and basically the Dao Ancestor of the subordinate forces will enter the Dao Ancestor corresponding to his own force, but there are also some bases of comprehensive forces, as well as some scattered cultivation bases.

The Dao Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain enter the Black Wind Mountain base belonging to the Black Wind Mountain, and if the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Human Race and the Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven Legion want to participate in the war, they can also enter the Black Wind Mountain base.

this day.

Ye Tian, his wife Xiao Yue, his sister Ye Yu, his son Ye Xingchen, and his daughter Ye Xingyue came to the Ancient Giant City through a large teleportation array closest to the Terran territory, and then left the Ancient Giant City and entered the Dark Forbidden Domain.

After entering the dark forbidden realm, Ye Tian reminded his family: "When you hear those visual and auditory hallucinations, don't care, and don't provoke them, otherwise you will encounter great terror, understand?"

"Got it!"

Several people hurriedly responded.

However, it was the first time they had entered the Dark Forbidden Realm, so they were very curious.

After a while, they came to the base of Black Wind Mountain.

The base of Black Wind Mountain is a base similar to a giant mountain, and the cities are located on the peaks of the mountains above, and many Dao Ancestors are inside the base.

Ye Tian found a lot of Dao Ancestors, far more than the last time he saw the Heavenly Kings, it can be seen that some of them belonged to some Heavenly Kings or Ten Kings.

Ye Tian, as the Great Heavenly King, obtained a mansion at the base of Black Wind Mountain, and his family also lived in the mansion.
